entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., the primary crop affected by rust disease

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping with groundnut to reduce rust incidence

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop used in intercropping with groundnut to reduce rust incidence

entities.name: GROUNDNUT RUST
entities.description: An economically important disease of groundnut caused by Puccinia arachidis

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes groundnut rust

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of groundnut pods, which can be reduced by rust infection

entities.name: UREDINIOSPORE GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of urediniospore sprouting, which is inhibited by certain pollens

entities.name: GERM TUBE GROWTH
entities.description: The growth of the germ tube from a spore, which is inhibited by certain pollens

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The agricultural practice of growing two or more crops together to reduce disease incidence

entities.name: POLLEN
entities.description: The male reproductive cells of plants, specifically from sorghum and pearl millet, that exhibit inhibitory effects on rust
